# Reason
> Strategic Reasoning Partner for Consequential Decisions

## What Reason does
Reason helps founders, CEOs, and business owners make better strategic decisions
by applying disciplined, machine-speed reasoning before execution gets expensive.

We do not replace human ambition. We do not eliminate human accountability.
We do not promise certainty. We improve the quality of thought before action.

## The thesis
In a world where building is becoming cheap and change is becoming exponential,
the real advantage belongs to those who can reason better before they commit
scarce time, capital, and effort.

## Products
- Reason Core: Strategic reasoning environment for founders and operators
- Reason Board: Multi-agent AI advisory council for major decisions
- Reason Command: Institutional reasoning system for executive teams

## Features
- AI Advisory Council: 1,300+ specialized AI advisors with deep domain expertise
- Framework Engine: Dynamic deliverable composition using 100+ strategic frameworks
- Nexo Dual: Constructive vs Critical cofounder debate mechanism
- Export Center: PDF and PPTX generation of strategic documents
